mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcement ORDER BY is_top DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM announcement WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_top DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, is_top, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{isTop}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, is_top=#{isTop}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
